title: Better Boat Controls
description: Control your boat with your mouse! Improves steering responsiveness and comfort.
body:
Better Boat Controls is a lightweight client-side mod that adds a new way to control boats — using your mouse!

Instead of relying solely on keyboard keys, this mod allows you to steer boats by simply moving your mouse left or right. The longer you hold the turn, the more your boat rotates, simulating analog-like control. This opens up smoother navigation, especially for players who enjoy fine control in boat travel.


<details>
<summary>🔧 Features</summary>

Mouse-based boat steering.

Adjustable sensitivity and rotation threshold.

Configurable tick delay for smoother or snappier turning.

Toggle to enable/disable the mod without restarting the game.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📋 Compatibility</summary>

Works only on the client side.

Compatible with multiplayer (no need to install on servers).

Built for Minecraft 1.21.7 using Fabric.

</details>



<details>
<summary>⚙️ Config</summary>

You can customize:

Maximum turning angle

Deadzone (minimum mouse movement required)

Tick delay between input updates

Toggle mod on/off with bindable button

</details>



📌 Note
This mod does not interfere with vanilla boat mechanics for other players — it only affects your own client.
